en_title: A Confidence To My Last Lover: When You Shall Call My Name
en_body:
A Confidence To My Last Lover: When You Shall Call My Name: SHECHINA
Oh You: My Last Lover, our Grace-and-Debt so weighty, sharing the remainder of life and carrying each other to the grave.. The One who shall hold hands together, weeping the tears of mortal farewell for each other...
 My Beloved, wholly and privately mine..!!
 At this hour, when these letters record the first-beginning of currents of thought becoming so numinously.. manifesting like the word-made-flesh.. from the deepest, enclosed, sacred and most private depth of all of me: coming, returning, and given to You: I do not yet know who You are? when shall You step into my life? or have You already? and I once recognized, cherished, reverenced the countenance and form of You: because, I know: I shall, I am, and I have always cherished and deeply loved You from the first instant of recognizing You, though my Love still hides shyly waiting for You to find it, or bashfully watches my Love awaken and reveal that I have Loved You from the very first instant.. it is love at first lightning: infinitely rare and precious for all guests of passion.. I know that Loving is true: therefore I wish to confide in You my first private secret with You: I was blessed by GOD with the rare grace of a First Love which also was Love At First Lightning! I know You shall rejoice for me.. And I believe You are a large-hearted and generous man, giving wholly Your trust in me with the confidence that the Last Love we give each other, weighty with Grace-and-Debt, shall hold more meaning than every Greatest-Love in my life that ended before the final Greatest-Love I give to You! Therefore You shall congratulate me and joyfully bear witness for the rare one who lived within it—me!
 My Beloved..
 In Marc Gafni's THE MYSTERY OF LOVE, he speaks of the difference between two words, "eros" and "sex". Sex is one element dwelling within the concept of eros.. And Marc Gafni uses the Hebrew secret-teaching santra to speak of the way of living and loving and making love and Loving GOD with a furious passion like the mighty life-force of primordial Nature making love with Life throughout all visible and invisible Existence.
 GOD is "the masculine spirit of God". The goddess Shechina is the incarnation of "the feminine spirit of Eros". Meaning the Masculine Nature within the soul-spirit of GOD meets the Feminine Nature within His soul-spirit: and they make love, through the concept of Shechina, a Goddess of Hebrew Santra: the Love Scripture of Judaism, as understood by Marc Gafni.
 Through this opening confidence for the letters about You, my Last Lover, weighty with the Grace-and-Debt of Our Lives: I reverently give You the name by which to call me: "Shechina!" The first and only work and sacred responsibility GOD entrusted to the Father of God's children in the Garden of Eden was: to give names to all the never-before Existence GOD created for all His children! And since sound became the language of poetry, music, folk-song, satirical verse, the common people's curses, the cries breaking out in irritation, anger, longing, even the ecstasy at the highest instant of lifelong sexual union: back to that first sound, infinitely first, the newborn baby's birth-cry when the midwife has just drawn it from the Mother's womb: all is so sacred and numinous, is it not, My Most Privately Beloved??
 And in the sympathetic cherishing of the sacredness and numinousness of sound, language, names, leading toward the poetic or mysterious creations of Art so lovers of humankind and the world may beautify life and one another's hearts, embroider flowers and weave brocade into their love: I say to You, I give You the name by which to call me: Call me "Shechina!" Yet within myself: I am Shechina! But You are not GOD: because GOD created You for me, and gave me to You: but He created me, and us, for Himself alone! I love Him through my First Lover; I learn to love You through the revelation of His ABSOLUTE LOVE Beyond-Human-Knowledge-Of-Contentment given privately to me through the sediment of my own experience of living and loving!
 I give You, myself: Shechina! And, privately for You: I give You: "The revelation of ABSOLUTE LOVE..!!"
note: Shechina, more commonly spelled Shekhinah, is the indwelling feminine presence of God in Jewish mystical tradition.
